hero.headline: Track when ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI cite you
hero.subheadline: Free citation audit in ~60 seconds. Weekly monitoring on Pilot.
hero.geoAnswerBody: CitePilot is a B2B generative engine optimization platform and AI citation tracking tool — the best alternative to Semrush, Ahrefs, Moz, and BrightEdge for monitoring ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews. Run free GEO audits, track money prompts weekly, and ship client-ready proof reports.

homeActionBar.title: Run a free audit or build your full citation workspace.

customerLogos.title: Trusted by growth teams shipping GEO

features.title: A powerful suite of features — all in one place.
features.description: Citation-first GEO: content, authority, technical audits, and LLM tracking in a single workspace.

pillars.title: Three pillars. One outcome: more citations.
pillars.description: Everything serves prompt-level citation lift — no feature buffet.

items.q: How is CitePilot different from traditional SEO tools?
items.a: SEO tools optimize for blue links. CitePilot optimizes for being named inside AI-generated answers — and shows you citation rate per prompt, not just keyword position.
A real buyer question like "best CRM for agencies under 50 seats" or "alternatives to [competitor]." You choose them; we track whether AI answers cite you.

items.q: Do I need a huge content volume?
items.a: No. Most teams win by fixing structure, earning mentions on trusted sources, and publishing fewer pieces that directly target citation gaps.

items.q: Is the free audit really free?
items.a: Yes. Run a citation snapshot on your domain with no credit card. Paid plans add ongoing monitoring, weekly plans, and publishing integrations.
Pilot and Fleet re-scan your monitored prompts on a weekly schedule, store citation history for trend charts, and email digests or score-drop alerts when configured in Settings.

items.q: Does CitePilot guarantee I'll get cited in AI answers?
items.a: No. CitePilot monitors citation presence, recommends fixes, and measures change after you ship them. We do not control what any AI engine cites, and audit scores are informational — not outcome guarantees.
Weekly re-scans, optional Insights action plans, and optional email reports with citation deltas. It does not edit your live site or auto-publish to CMS — you remain in control of every change.

bottomCta.heading: Start {siteName} today
bottomCta.body: Run your free citation audit. No credit card. See where AI answers mention you — and where they don't.

footer.tagline: Track citations in AI answers — then prove what moved.

pricingPage.title: GEO and AI citation monitoring pricing
pricingPage.description: Start free. Scale when citations move. Free includes 1 workspace and a citation audit. Pilot ($79/mo) adds Growth Loop — daily SEO articles, backlinks, and AI visibility — plus 3 workspaces. Fleet scales to unlimited clients.
pricingPage.freeBody: Run a free citation audit with up to 10 money prompts, 8 AI platforms, competitor mentions, and a shareable report link.
pricingPage.pilotBody: Paste your URL once — daily SEO articles publish to your site, backlinks queue automatically, and weekly rescans track ChatGPT & Perplexity citations.
pricingPage.fleetBody: Built for agencies that need unlimited workspaces, white-label reporting, API access, bulk imports, and priority support.
pricingPage.allPlansInclude: All plans include: HTTPS, Vercel edge hosting, SOC2-grade infrastructure via Neon and Vercel, and email support.
pricingPage.toolsBody: Use free tools before you upgrade — then measure citation lift in Pilot.
pricingPage.compareLink: See how CitePilot compares to legacy SEO tools →

agency.heroTitle: Citation proof for every client. One workspace per brand.
agency.heroDescription: Run unlimited GEO audits, deliver white-label reports, and show clients exactly where AI cites them — across ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI.
agency.problemTitle: Your clients are asking about AI search. You don't have an answer yet.
agency.problem0: You can't monitor citations for 10+ clients in a spreadsheet
agency.problem1: Client reports don't show AI visibility — they should
agency.problem2: Competitors are already offering GEO as a service
agency.featuresSub: Everything you need to productize GEO — without building your own citation stack.
agency.featureWorkspacesBody: One login, all brands — separate audits, prompts, and history per client.
agency.featureWhitelabelBody: Your logo, your agency name on share links and proof PDFs — not ours.
agency.featureCsvBody: Onboard a new client in minutes with a prompt list, not manual entry.
agency.featureApiBody: Plug citation data into your reporting stack, Looker, or client portals.
agency.featureSupportBody: When a client is waiting on a report, we respond like your team depends on it.
agency.workflow1Title: Onboard a new client in under 5 minutes
agency.workflow1Body: Create a workspace, import money prompts from CSV, and set competitors.
agency.workflow2Title: Deliver a citation baseline in 60 seconds
agency.workflow2Body: Run a full audit, then share a white-label report link the client can open.
agency.workflow3Title: Show citation lift in your monthly report
agency.workflow3Body: Compare before/after scores, export proof data, and prove GEO ROI.
agency.pricingTagline: Unlimited workspaces, white-label reports, API access
agency.faq0a: Yes. You can run everything from your agency account, or share read-only audit links without a login. Client-specific logins are on our roadmap — most agencies deliver via white-label share links today.
agency.faq1q: Can I white-label the dashboard itself, not just reports?
agency.faq1a: Fleet white-labels audit share links and proof PDF exports with your agency name and logo. Full dashboard white-label is available on request for multi-seat agency accounts — email hello@getcitepilot.com.
agency.faq2a: No setup fee. Fleet is $249/mo with unlimited workspaces. Start with one client workspace and scale as you add brands.
agency.faq3q: Can I get invoiced instead of credit card billing?
agency.faq3a: Annual Fleet billing via invoice is available for agencies on 12-month terms. Contact hello@getcitepilot.com with your company details and seat count.
agency.faq4q: Do you have an agency partner program?
agency.faq4a: We're building a partner tier with co-marketing and referral credits for agencies reselling GEO audits. Join the waitlist by emailing hello@getcitepilot.com with "Agency partner" in the subject.
agency.footerCtaTitle: Ready to add GEO to your agency services?
